user.title: Wiener Linien Monitor
user.description: Set up a Wiener Linien departure monitor.

error.no_stops: Please enter at least one stop ID.
Please enter at least one stop ID.

fetch_departures.name: Fetch Departures
fetch_departures.description: Call Wiener Linien API to get next departures for a stop ID.

oebb_search_station.name: OeBB: Search Station
oebb_search_station.description: Search OeBB stations by name to find station IDs.

query.name: Search Query
query.description: Station name or partial name to search for.

max_results.name: Max Results
max_results.description: Maximum number of stations to return.

oebb_station_board.name: OeBB: Station Board
oebb_station_board.description: Fetch departures or arrivals at an OeBB station.

station_id.name: Station ID
station_id.description: OeBB station ID (extId). Use oebb_search_station to find this.

station_name.name: Station Name
station_name.description: Station name for automatic lookup. Used if Station ID is not provided.

board_type.name: Board Type
board_type.description: DEP for departures, ARR for arrivals.

max_journeys.name: Max Journeys
max_journeys.description: Maximum number of departures or arrivals to return.

oebb_trip_search.name: OeBB: Trip Search
oebb_trip_search.description: Search for train connections between two OeBB stations.

from_station_name.name: From Station Name
from_station_name.description: Departure station name for automatic lookup.

to_station_name.name: To Station Name
to_station_name.description: Arrival station name for automatic lookup.

max_connections.name: Max Connections
max_connections.description: Maximum number of connections to return.

time.name: Time
time.description: Departure or arrival time. If not set, the current time is used.

time_mode.name: Time Mode
time_mode.description: Whether the specified time is a departure or arrival time.
